title: Labor Relations Specialists
description: Resolve disputes between workers and managers, negotiate collective bargaining agreements, or coordinate grievance procedures to handle employee complaints.

tasks.text: Negotiate collective bargaining agreements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Investigate and evaluate union complaints or arguments to determine viability.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Propose resolutions for collective bargaining or other labor or contract negotiations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draft contract proposals or counter-proposals for collective bargaining or other labor negotiations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Interpret contractual agreements for employers and employees engaged in collective bargaining or other labor relations processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare evidence for disciplinary hearings, including preparing witnesses to testify.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mediate discussions between employer and employee representatives in attempt to reconcile differences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review employer practices or employee data to ensure compliance with contracts on matters such as wages, hours, or conditions of employment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Recommend collective bargaining strategies, goals, or objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor company or workforce adherence to labor agreements.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Call or meet with union, company, government, or other interested parties to discuss labor relations matters, such as contract negotiations or grievances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess risk levels associated with collective bargaining strategies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Present the position of the company or of labor during arbitration or other labor negotiations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify alternatives to proposals of unions, employees, companies, or government agencies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Draft rules or regulations to govern collective bargaining activities in collaboration with company, government, or employee representatives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research case law or outcomes of previous case hearings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write letters related to labor relations activities, such as letters to amend collective bargaining agreements, letters of dispute or conciliation, or letters to seek clarification of contract terms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Schedule or coordinate the details of grievance hearings or other meetings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and approve employee disciplinary actions, such as written reprimands, suspensions, or terminations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Select mediators or arbitrators for labor disputes or contract negotiations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess the impact of union proposals on company or government operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Advise management on matters related to the administration of contracts or employee discipline or grievance procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train managers or supervisors on topics related to labor relations, such as working conditions, safety, or equal opportunity practices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide expert testimony in legal proceedings related to labor relations or labor contracts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop employee health and safety policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop methods to monitor employee satisfaction with policies or working conditions, including grievance or complaint procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports or presentations to communicate employee satisfaction or related data to management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and submit required governmental reports or forms related to labor relations matters, such as equal employment opportunity (EEO) forms, new hire forms, or minority compensation reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
